title: Supporting information
description: Information to help you complete your paper tax return or tax return supplement.

child_links.title: Amounts that you do not pay tax on 2018
child_links.description: Information about those amounts that you do not pay tax on.

child_links.title: Special circumstances and glossary 2018
child_links.description: Special circumstances affecting how your tax is calculated and a glossary of terms used in the tax return instructions.

child_links.title: Referred publications 2018
child_links.description: You may need to refer to some of these publications and rulings to prepare your 2018 tax return.

child_links.title: Checklist - tax return 2018
child_links.description: Complete the tax return checklist to avoid any delays when you lodge your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Checklist - Supplement 2018
child_links.description: Complete the supplementary checklist to make sure you have completed your supplementary tax return before lodgment.

child_links.title: CBS Australia takeover of Ten Network
child_links.description: Ten Network Holdings shareholders will need to account for a CGT event that occurred on 10 November 2017.

child_links.title: Domain separation from Fairfax Media
child_links.description: Fairfax Media separated Domain Holdings on 22 November 2017. Shareholders will need to account for a CGT event.

child_links.title: Restructure of Paladin Energy Limited
child_links.description: Paladin Energy Ltd shareholders will need to account for a CGT event that occurred on 1 February 2018.

child_links.title: Tabcorp - Tatts Scheme of Arrangement
child_links.description: Tatts shareholders will need to account for a CGT event that occurred on 17 December 2017.

child_links.title: Westfield Group - takeover by Unibail-Rodamco SE (2018)
child_links.description: Tax information for Westfield Group stapled security holders.
